nl_prompt: What is the revenue for the top-selling product?
generated_sql:
SELECT p.name AS product_name, SUM(oi.line_total) AS total_revenue
FROM order_items oi
JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.id
JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id
GROUP BY p.name
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 1

nl_prompt: Which product categories have more than 10 percent return rate?
generated_sql: SELECT p.category FROM products p JOIN orders o ON p.id = o.product_id JOIN returns r ON o.id = r.order_id GROUP BY p.category HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN r.return_date IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(o.id) > 10

nl_prompt: What is the revenue per customer segment?
generated_sql:
SELECT c.segment, SUM(o.line_value) AS total_revenue
FROM orders o
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id
GROUP BY c.segment

nl_prompt: Which sales rep closed the most orders?
generated_sql:
SELECT s.rep_name, COUNT(o.id) AS order_count
FROM sales_reps s
JOIN orders o ON s.id = o.sales_rep_id
GROUP BY s.rep_name
ORDER BY order_count DESC
LIMIT 1

nl_prompt: What is the monthly revenue trend for the last 12 months?
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', order_date) AS month,
    SUM(line_value) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    orders
WHERE 
    order_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 year'
GROUP BY 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', order_date)
ORDER BY 
    month

nl_prompt: What is the average order value per customer segment?
generated_sql:
SELECT c.segment, AVG(o.line_value) AS avg_order_value
FROM orders o
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id
GROUP BY c.segment

nl_prompt: What is the revenue from completed orders versus pending orders?
generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN o.status = 'Completed' THEN oi.line_total ELSE 0 END) AS completed_revenue,
       SUM(CASE WHEN o.status = 'Pending' THEN oi.line_total ELSE 0 END) AS pending_revenue
FROM orders o
JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id

nl_prompt: Which product has the highest total quantity sold?
generated_sql: SELECT p.name FROM products p JOIN orders o ON p.id = o.product_id GROUP BY p.name ORDER BY SUM(o.quantity) DESC LIMIT 1

nl_prompt: What is the total discount given across all orders?
generated_sql: SELECT SUM(discount_pct) AS total_discount FROM orders

nl_prompt: What is the average number of items per order by category?

SELECT p.category, AVG(o.quantity) AS avg_items_per_order
FROM orders o
JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id
GROUP BY p.category

nl_prompt: What percentage of revenue comes from our top 20 percent of customers?

  AND c.segment = 'Active'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1

    WHERE ld.order_id = o.id
      AND ld.status_code != 0
  )

SELECT c.name FROM customers c

nl_prompt: Summarize delivery complaint themes for top 10 revenue customers.
generated_sql:
SELECT c.name AS customer_name, COUNT(ld.tracking_id) AS complaint_count
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id
JOIN logistics_deliveries ld ON o.shipping_id = ld.shipping_ref
WHERE o.status = 'Cancelled'
GROUP BY c.name
ORDER BY SUM(o.line_value) DESC
LIMIT 10

nl_prompt: Which product categories have the most negative sentiment?
generated_sql: SELECT p.category FROM products p JOIN order_items oi ON p.id = oi.product_id JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.id WHERE o.status = 'Cancelled' GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY SUM(oi.line_total) DESC LIMIT 1

nl_prompt: What common complaints appear for delayed shipments?
generated_sql: SELECT reason FROM returns WHERE order_id IN (SELECT id FROM orders WHERE status = 'Delayed')

nl_prompt: Find customers who mentioned competitors in support.
generated_sql: SELECT DISTINCT c.name FROM customers c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id INNER JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id WHERE oi.product_id IN (SELECT p.id FROM products p WHERE p.category = 'Competitors') AND o.status = 'Support'

nl_prompt: What were top 3 reasons for returns?
generated_sql: SELECT reason FROM returns GROUP BY reason ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 3

nl_prompt: Which sales reps have customers with most positive feedback?
generated_sql: SELECT s.rep_name FROM sales_reps s JOIN orders o ON s.id = o.sales_rep_id JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id WHERE c.segment = 'Positive' GROUP BY s.rep_name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

nl_prompt: Summarize key themes for Enterprise segment accounts.
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    s.account_name,
    COUNT(s.id) AS total_accounts,
    SUM(CASE WHEN o.status = 'Completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed_orders,
    SUM(CASE WHEN o.status = 'Pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pending_orders,
    AVG(o.line_value) AS average_order_value
FROM 
    sf_accounts s
JOIN 
    orders o ON s.account_id = o.account_id
WHERE 
    s.segment = 'Enterprise'
GROUP BY 
    s.account_name

nl_prompt: Which logistics partners have most damaged goods complaints?
generated_sql: SELECT carrier_name FROM logistics_deliveries WHERE status_code = 1 GROUP BY carrier_name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

nl_prompt: What do churned customers say were top reasons for leaving?
generated_sql: SELECT r.reason FROM returns r INNER JOIN orders o ON r.order_id = o.id WHERE o.status = 'Cancelled'

nl_prompt: Find orders where complaints mention product defects.
generated_sql: SELECT o.id FROM orders o JOIN returns r ON o.id = r.order_id WHERE r.reason LIKE '%product defect%'
